title: Item Limits
description: Easily Create limits of those items you don't want at all or just a few of!
body:
# Item Limits
Item Limits provides a comprehensive solution for server administrators to implement strict item limits. It ensures balanced gameplay by restricting the number of specific items players can hold, limiting pickups, and managing loot generation using a highly efficient system.
## Features
- **Inventory Limits**: Automatically checks and enforces limits on item quantities in player inventories.
- **Pickup Restrictions**: Prevents players from picking up items if they exceed the defined limit.
- **Loot Generation Control**: Integrates with loot tables to respect item limits during generation.
- **Interactive Admin GUI**: A user-friendly dashboard for managing limits and settings without commands.
- **Notification System**: Informs players via chat when they reach or exceed limits.
- **Admin Bypass**: Configurable permissions to allow admins to bypass all limits.
- **Optimized Performance**: designed to have minimal impact on server performance.
## Commands
- `/ilimit`: Opens the main administration dashboard to manage settings.
## Permissions
- `limitless.admin`: Access to admin GUI and commands. (Default: OP)
- `limitless.bypass.*`: Bypass all configured item limits. (Default: OP)
## Installation

1. Download the latest ItemLimiter.jar.
2. Place the jar file into the server's plugins directory.
3. Restart the server.
## Support
For assistance or suggestions, please visit our Discord server or website.
Discord: https://discord.gg/zyvDgFQk

Developed by: thebestharrison / Logix / VexorCore
